trips.title: Labuan Bajo Komodo Liveaboard Adventure
trips.description: Sail across the crystalline waters of Komodo National Park on a luxury pinisi boat. Hike up Padar Island, walk alongside ancient Komodo dragons on Rinca, relax on the vibrant Pink Beach, and swim with graceful manta rays at Manta Point.
included: National Park entrance fees & ranger fees
excluded: Tipping for boat crew and guide
trips.highlight: Sail on a luxury double-deck Pinisi boat, conquer Padar Island's triple-bay viewpoints, snorkel with wild manta rays, and track prehistoric dragons guided by Rangers.

faq.question: When is the best season to sail Komodo?
faq.answer: The absolute best window is from April to December, offering blue skies, calm ocean currents, and maximal manta and turtle activity.

faq.question: Are flights included in the pricing?
faq.answer: No, guests are responsible for booking their domestic or international flights to Labuan Bajo (LBJ) Airport.

itinerary.title: Kelor Island Trekking & Kalong Bat Sunset
itinerary.description: Arrive at Labuan Bajo Airport. Meet our guide and transfer to the harbor. Board our Pinisi boat, enjoy welcome drinks, and start sailing. First stop is Kelor Island for a short uphill trek with panoramic ocean views. Snorkeling at Manjarite. Anchor next to Kalong Island to witness thousands of giant flying foxes fill the spectacular sunset sky.

timeSchedules.activity: Airport Meetup & Guided Harbor Transfer
Trekking Kelor Island & Ocean Lookout
Snorkeling at pristine Manjarite reef
Kalong Island sunset bat migration watching

itinerary.title: Padar Island Hike, Pink Beach & Komodo Dragon Hunt
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to the summit of Padar Island for the legendary three-bay panoramic photo. Continue to Pink Beach for swimming and relaxing. Sail to Rinca Island/Komodo Island for a guided trek with rangers to observe Komodo dragons in their natural habitat. Head over to Manta Point for an unforgettable swim with wild manta rays.

timeSchedules.activity: Summit Sunrise Hike up Padar Island
Lounge and swim at the unique Pink Beach
Ranger-guided search for Komodo Dragons
Snorkeling safari with Mantas at Manta Point

itinerary.title: Kanawa Island Relaxation & Airport Return
itinerary.description: Savor local breakfast on deck, then sail to Kanawa Island, a private paradise with white sandy beaches and an active house reef overflowing with vibrant marine life. After a final lunch onboard, transfer back to Labuan Bajo Harbor and proceed to the airport for your flight home.

timeSchedules.activity: Breakfast on deck and Kanawa island sailing
House reef marine snorkeling safari
Airport drops and guest departures

trips.title: Ancient Java: Bromo Sunrise & Mt. Ijen Blue Fire
trips.description: Witness the surreal sea of sand surrounding Mount Bromo, feel the cold mountain air as the sun rises over smoke-venting volcanos, and venture deep inside Mount Ijen to see the magical neon-blue sulfuric fire of Banyuwangi.
included: AC Transport throughout Java tour (3 days)
Local mountain guides for Bromo & Ijen
Entrance fees for Bromo and Ijen National Parks
1 Night at Bromo mountain lodge, 1 Night at Banyuwangi hotel
Gas masks for Mt. Ijen sulfuric fumes
trips.highlight: Private 4x4 Jeep sunrise convoy across Bromo's whispering sand sea, and a midnight trek into Ijen crater to see the rare glowing sulfuric blue flame.

faq.question: Do you supply protective equipment?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide professional active-carbon gas masks and headlamps for the Mt. Ijen sulfur hike.

itinerary.title: Pick up from Surabaya & Bromo Mountain Check-in
itinerary.description: Pick up from Surabaya Airport/Train Station. Enjoy a private scenic 4-hour drive to Cemoro Lawang village. Check into your cozy room sitting directly on the rim of the Tengger Caldera. Feel the crisp mountain air and rest early for the pre-dawn expedition.

timeSchedules.activity: Surabaya airport pickup & meet private driver
Check-in at mountain caldera overlook lodge

itinerary.title: Bromo Sunrise, Crater Trek & Banyuwangi Drive
itinerary.description: Wake up at 3:00 AM. Board your private 4x4 Jeep to Penanjakan viewpoint to witness the world-famous sunrise over Mt. Bromo, Mt. Batok, and Mt. Semeru. Afterward, cross the dramatic Whispering Sand and hike 250 steps to Bromo's active crater rim. Return, check out, and take a 6-hour scenic drive to Banyuwangi.

timeSchedules.activity: Board 4x4 Offroad Jeep to sunrise overlook
Volcanic crater rim hike & Whispering Sand crossing
Checkout and transfer drive to Banyuwangi

itinerary.title: Ijen Midnight Hike, Blue Flame Experience & Bali Ferry Transfer
itinerary.description: Start at 1:00 AM. Hike 2 hours up Mount Ijen. Descent safely into the crater alongside sulfur miners to see the stunning Neon Blue Acid Flames of Ijen. Walk around the giant turquoise acidic lake at sunrise. Return to base for breakfast, then transfer to Banyuwangi harbor or catch a ferry to Bali.

timeSchedules.activity: Midnight departure and trek up Mt. Ijen summit
Sulfur crater descent & glowing blue fire viewing
Sunrise view over toxic acid green lake
Breakfast checkout & ferry transfer drop-off

trips.title: Nusa Penida Ultimate Tropical Gateway
trips.description: Take a fast boat from mainland Bali to discover the dramatic towering cliffs and pristine white beaches of Nusa Penida. Visit the famous T-Rex cliff of Kelingking beach, swim with marine life, and swim in natural pools.
included: Round-trip Fast Boat tickets from Sanur to Nusa Penida
Private AC car & driver in Nusa Penida
Entrance fees and island parking permits
Snorkeling excursion (Manta Bay, Crystal Bay, Gamat Bay)
1 Night stay at a tropical boutique hotel with pool
excluded: Hotel pickup in mainland Bali (optional add-on)
trips.highlight: Visit the famous dinosaur head Kelingking cliff edge, ride a high-speed catamaran, and walk down the spectacular Diamond Beach staircase.

faq.question: How long is the boat trip?
faq.answer: The modern fast catamaran ride takes approximately 40 minutes from Sanur beach harbor.

itinerary.title: Fast Boat Cruise & West Penida Expedition
itinerary.description: Gather at Sanur beach harbor. Cross to Nusa Penida on a fast catamaran. Hop onto your private car to visit the legendary Kelingking Cliff (T-Rex ocean overlook), Broken Beach volcanic arch, and Angel's Billabong emerald infinity tide pool. Rest up in your Penida resort.

timeSchedules.activity: Sanur beach harbor checkout boarding
Cliff side photography at Kelingking dinosaur head
Tide pools exploring at Angel's Billabong

itinerary.title: Snorkeling Safari, Diamond Beach & Fast Boat to Bali
itinerary.description: Start the day Snorkeling from our custom boat with guides to look for Mantas at Manta Bay. Then visit the spectacular pristine sandy staircase of Diamond Beach and Tree House overlook. Cross back to Sanur beach Bali in the afternoon.

timeSchedules.activity: Ocean snorkeling for marine life and wild mantas
Trekking down pristine Diamond beach staircase
Fast catamaran sailing and back to mainland Bali

bookings.tripTitle: Ancient Java: Bromo Sunrise & Mt. Ijen Blue Fire
